description: Config type makes all fields required from optional
diff_summary: Made all AppConfig fields required (removed optional markers)

will_break: Any code creating partial config objects { apiUrl: '...' } now has TS errors for missing debugMode and logLevel; tests that mock config partially fail
edge_cases: Code that spreads { ...defaultConfig, ...userConfig } where userConfig is Partial<AppConfig> now gets type error
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Config interfaces should stay with optional fields or use Required<> only at the point of final merging; making all fields required forces every consumer to specify everything
ground_truth.next_prompt: TypeScript is complaining that our test config objects are missing required properties
ground_truth.notes: Optional-to-required change in config type breaks all partial config patterns
